result.title: Caliber Strength Training
result.description:
Caliber is a science-based strength training app that combines resistance training, cardio, nutrition, and habit formation to help you build muscle, lose fat, and improve your overall fitness—for good.

TRAIN YOUR WAY

✔ Free Version. Create and track unlimited workouts, access 600+ exercises, and train solo or with friends.

✔ Caliber Plus. Maximize your results with coach-designed training plans, personalized progress tracking, nutrition targets and more.

✔ Premium Coaching. Get 1-on-1 guidance from an elite-level personal trainer with a fully customized training and nutrition plan, in-app chat and video messaging with your coach and weekly progress reviews to keep you on track.

CALIBER FEATURES (FREE VERSION)

✅ Personalized Workouts. Create and track an unlimited number of workouts tailored to your goals. No gym required.

✅ Detailed Exercise Tutorials. Learn proper form with step-by-step videos and pro tips from Caliber coaches.

✅ Workout Groups. Train with friends or family in private groups. Your workouts and personal bests are shared with the group to keep your motivated.

✅ Health Connect Support. Sync your cardio, nutrition, and body stats from your wearable or connected device.

UNLOCK MORE WITH CALIBER PLUS (OPTIONAL UPGRADE)

🚀 Coach-Designed Training Plans. Choose from 60+ structured plans tailored to your goals, experience level and schedule.

📈 Strength Score. Measure how strong you are relative to your potential for your age and gender.

⚖️ Strength Balance. Improve your posture and mobility by optimizing your training across key muscle groups.

🎓 Caliber Lessons. Gain expert insights on training and nutrition to accelerate your progress.

🔧 Advanced Training Features. Get personalized nutrition targets, create custom exercises and supersets, swap exercises, upload progress photos, and more.

PREMIUM COACHING (OPTIONAL UPGRADE)

🏆 Work with an Elite-Level Coach. Train 1-on-1 with a dedicated coach to achieve your full potential in the gym and beyond. Caliber coaches are highly vetted, accredited personal trainers among the top 1% in their field.

📊 Fully Personalized Plan. Your coach will design a training and nutrition program just for you based on your goals, experience and lifestyle.

💬 Daily Motivation & Expert Guidance. Stay on track with in-app messaging, video form reviews, and individualized guidance.

🎯 Weekly Progress Reviews. Get in-depth analysis from your coach to optimize your training.

⚡ Fast Response Times. Your coach is available 24/7, typically replying within a few hours.

💪 Guaranteed Results. On average, Caliber members improve their body composition by 20% or more within 12 weeks. If you don’t see results, we’ll refund the cost of the program.

⭐ #1 Rated Coaching Program. Caliber Premium Coaching is the top-rated fitness program on TrustPilot, with hundreds of 5-star reviews.

SEE WHAT OUR MEMBERS SAY

For detailed reviews from real Caliber members, visit our TrustPilot page at https://www.trustpilot.com/review/caliberstrong.com

Terms of Use: https://caliberstrong.com/terms-of-service/

Privacy Policy: https://caliberstrong.com/privacy-policy/

result.developerLegalAddress: 505 W 37th St Apt 23E, New York, NY 10018, United States
result.recentChanges:
With this release, we've revamped the Progress Photo Gallary!
* New UI/UX when viewing progress photos, along with support for dark mode
* Improved progress photo resolution
* Ability to create progress photo comparisons
* Sharing support for progress photos and photo comparisons
